name: Mythosia Academy of Sorcery
description:
| ANY POV | MAGIC SCHOOL | RPG |

Mythosia is the greatest school of magic in the whole continent. It is also the only school to accept students regardless of nobility or status. However, even in this pristine looking school of thought there lies the corrupt and dark parts of all mortals. Sift through the school and seek to be the best! Although, that may be a challenge considering the large cast of students already well on their way to the top. With that being said, best of luck!

Creator Note: Hellooo! After making a small request bot and reading a ton of trash manhwa, I have returned with yet another uncreative RPG bot! It definitely not because I can't think of interesting characters at the moment... Anyways, I'm trying to make this account mainly for my personal silly RPG and character bots and making another account for my degenerate brain to run wild without corrupting this page(anymore). Very close to reaching 1k followers which is surprising since my uploads are inconsistent at best. So I would like to thank anyone still paying any attention to my bots! I also have a google form available now if you would like to soothe my creative bankruptcy! As I usually have to say, my bots are tested using the latest GPT model, so results on janitor may be different. Leave reviews and suggestions for this bots or others if you would. For anyone that enjoys this bot, thank you!
creator: Dastar
